description: Paired joint smoke test of the final candidate elderly ride preference and health-sensitive weather exposure choice mechanism.
scope_notes: J0 and J1 share Agents, activities, OD, weather, fleet, random utility shocks and dispatch priorities.
Only the elderly ride-hailing mode constant changes from +0.1 to +0.3.
The comparison checks whether vulnerable accessible elderly can show stronger conditional demand without making the total elderly share exceed middle-aged demand by construction.
